calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Robert Fletcher, Esq. for Plaintiff: City and County of San Francisco.
Plaintiff's Witness: Maria Porras, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Anna Kmet aka Anna Prill, and Bozena Gasparova aka Gasparova Bozena as follows:
Principal $232,720.34
Prejudgment Interest $32,590.66
Costs $842.94, for a total of $266,153.94
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
